scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks && echo '✓ pre-commit + pre-push hooks active'
scripts.verify: node scripts/sync-sw-version.cjs && python3 scripts/check-innerhtml.py && python3 scripts/check-innerhtml-pieces.py && HARRISON_HEBREW_BASELINE=0 node scripts/harrison-hebrew-baseline.cjs --strict && npm test && bash scripts/build.sh
